description_long: This is a vintage-style briefcase with a rectangular, slightly rounded body made from distressed brown leather, giving it a classic and worn appearance. The top edge is reinforced with a metallic brass frame, featuring visible rivets and a robust hinge mechanism. A padded leather handle, attached with brass hardware, sits atop the frame, providing a comfortable grip. The closure system consists of two prominent brass latches on either side of the handle, suggesting secure and reliable fastening. The sides of the briefcase are soft and flexible, with subtle creases and folds in the leather, indicating it can expand slightly when filled. There are no visible external pockets, logos, or corner reinforcements, maintaining a minimalist and utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A vintage brown leather briefcase with a brass frame, padded handle, and dual brass latches, featuring a classic, worn look and no external pockets or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full leather body, brass frame, padded handle, and two brass latches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the briefcase, the flexible leather sides, and the profile of the brass frame and handle.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, showing the leather body and brass frame without visible latches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the thickness and flexible leather construction.
attribute_handle_type: Single padded leather handle, arched shape, attached with brass hardware, fixed and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two brass latches located on the top frame, manual snap closure, no visible key or combination lock.
